title: Palantir Technologies Inc (PLTR), 2025 Q1 earnings digest
description: $PLTR has released its Q1 2025 earnings, showcasing robust revenue growth of 39% year-over-year, with US revenue surging 55%. Key stats reveal an adjusted EPS of $0.13, and a strong adjusted operating margin of 44%, indicating solid profitability. ⚖️ Risk factors include global uncertainty potentially affecting spending, but demand for their AI solutions remains high. Future opportunities seem promising, with AIP driving expansion. 🚀 For more details, check valueverge.com/PLTR.

title: Alex Karp, CEO of Palantir: Exclusive Interview Inside PLTR Office
description:
Alex Karp, CEO of Palantir, joins Molly O’Shea for a rare look inside Palantir (physically, inside their office). We go deep into their values, vision, and the moral foundation of technology in the AI era.

Fresh off Palantir’s record-breaking earnings, nearly hitting a $500 billion market-cap milestone, and the release of a new biography The Philosopher in the Valley, this episode explores how Palantir evolved from an outsider idea into one of the world’s most influential software companies.
